seoTitle: Nangus vs Nanima — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nangus and Nanima. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nangus and Nanima.
heading: Nangus vs Nanima — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nangus, New South Wales and Nanima, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nanima has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Nangus (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nangus or Nanima safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nangus has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Nanima scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nangus scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Nanima scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nangus or Nanima?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nanima has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
